scenario.goal: introduce our factory and ask whether they are open to new suppliers

subject_options: Frozen Mixed Vegetables Supply for Acme Foods
Possible Support for Acme Foods' Frozen Mixed Vegetables Needs

drafts.version_a:
Dear Anna,

I hope you are doing well.

I am reaching out from Ningbo FreshGrow Foods regarding our frozen mixed vegetables and the possibility of supporting Acme Foods. We understand your team is active in the Poland market. Based on the profile information provided, your business appears relevant to this offer.

Our purpose is simple: introduce our factory and ask whether they are open to new suppliers.

If useful, I can share a brief product overview, standard specifications, and a starting point for discussion.

Please let me know if you would be open to a short exchange on this.

Best regards,
Leo
Ningbo FreshGrow Foods
drafts.version_b:
Dear Anna,

I hope you are doing well.

I am contacting you about frozen mixed vegetables and would like to introduce our factory and ask whether they are open to new suppliers.

If this is relevant for your team, I would be glad to share the next details.

Please let me know if you would be open to a short exchange on this.

Best regards,
Leo
Ningbo FreshGrow Foods

review_notes: 建议人工复核后发送，不要把未确认信息直接写成既定事实。
邮件中涉及客户画像摘要的信息时，应核对其是否来自已确认的公开资料。
已应用输入约束：Keep the email concise and avoid hard selling.
unconfirmed_fact_checklist: 确认客户画像摘要、销售切入点和任何具体需求判断都来自公开且已核实的信息。
input_signals_used: goal: introduce our factory and ask whether they are open to new suppliers
customer_profile_summary: Company website shows private-label frozen food focus in EU retail.
constraints: Keep the email concise and avoid hard selling.
